_comment: Stride V2 rules. At go-time, MERGE the v2 block into the existing V1 ruleset (do not replace V1). V1's keyless /stride paths stay exactly as they are in ACTIVATE.md Step 0.

v2._comment: Reads open (data is anonymous numbers; the page is keyless). Writes require auth, so only the service-account cron can write — nobody can inject fake health data.
